title: Tmag_UpperLevel Property
description: Sets or returns the upper threshold value for resultant torque.
notes:
Tmag_UpperLevel sets or returns the value of the upper threshold for resultant torque.

This is used for error checking and task completion conditions.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
examples:
Function SettingLevels FSet FT1.Enabled, False, False, False, False, False, False, False, True FSet FT1.Tmag_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FT1.Tmag_Levels, 0, 3000 Trap 1, FT1 Call ForceError
Fend
